questions.question: 1 (a) On Fig. 1.1, mark a point P where the acceleration of the car is zero. [1] (b) Determine: (i) the speed of the car at time t = 15 s speed = ...........................................................[2] (ii) the average speed of the car between time t = 30 s and time t = 45 s. average speed = .............................
